semantic_text: Add approval status handling and styling for member data display

Add EMR Screen with dynamic member name and medical necessity results

- Added new EMR Screen that appears after Medical Screen button click
- Implemented transitionToEMRScreen() method with proper animations
- Added dynamic member name retrieval from .member_name class element
- Enhanced handleBackAction() to support 3-screen navigation flow (Welcome -> Medical -> EMR)
- Updated handleLearnMoreClick() to handle 'Back to Medical' button
- Added EMR action buttons: Approve authorization, Review criteria data, Refer transition care
- Styled EMR screen to match Medical Screen look and feel
- Added info icon after 'medical necessity criteria' text
- Implemented proper text formatting with bold '2 days' highlight
- Added handleEMRAction() method for EMR button interactions
- Maintained professional UI consistency across all screens
Add data table cell identification classes for authorizations

Add Medical Necessity Criteria popup with standardized modal positioning

- Added interactive info icon in EMR screen with click functionality
- Implemented showMedicalNecessityPopup() method with comprehensive criteria details
- Added popup content displaying Medical Necessity Guidelines assessment process
- Included cross-check criteria: Payor guidelines, Risk stratification, Historical claims,
  Evidence-based sources, Behavioral health sources, SDoH data, Third-party data
- Applied consistent modal positioning (left: 320px) matching other extension modals
- Added proper animations, backdrop blur, and close functionality
- Established standardized modal template for future development
- Enhanced user experience with hover effects and keyboard support

Restore summary screen functionality and improve EMR approval workflow

- Added missing transitionToSummaryScreen method with proper summary content
- Added missing resetToWelcomeScreen method for Done button functionality
- Enhanced handleNextAction to properly handle Done button clicks
- Improved summary screen to hide EMR buttons and show only Done button
- Added tab clicking functionality (closed-tab-btn) during approval process
- Fixed 5-second delay before showing summary screen
- Ensured Done button is properly visible and styled in summary screen
- Cleaned up project structure by removing obsolete files

Refactor Dashboard component and extract Header into a separate component; implement member click handling and remove logout modal logic from Dashboard. Add new Member component with detailed member overview and authorization request handling.
Add Sign Up modal with demo credentials; implement styling and functionality for user-friendly experience

Disable transition care button and update Learn More modal styling

- Disabled 'Refer for internal transition of care assistance / planning' button in EMR screen
- Updated Learn More modal to match Medical Necessity Criteria modal styling:
  - Changed from dark gradient to clean white background
  - Updated text colors to professional dark grays
  - Reduced width from 850px to 600px for consistency
  - Added proper hover effects for close button
  - Improved typography and spacing for medical interface standards

Fix EMR screen UI: remove duplicated buttons, match Medical screen styling, remove Back to Medical functionality

- Remove duplicated EMR action buttons and prevent future duplicates
- Update EMR buttons to exactly match Medical screen 'Check medical necessity criteria' button styling
- Use consistent gradient background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2dd4bf 0%, #14b8a6 100%)
- Remove 'Back to Medical' button functionality from EMR screen
- Hide back button entirely in EMR screen for cleaner UX
- Ensure consistent button layout and spacing across screens
Rename "My Dashboard" button to "Dashboard" for consistency
Add styled login page with responsive layout and password visibility toggle; improve error handling and include demo credentials

Update Medical Modal: reduce content to prevent scrolling and change branding from Val to Guidra

- Reduced entries per section from 3 to 2 items
- Decreased font sizes and padding throughout modal
- Reduced modal width from 800px to 700px and height from 80vh to 70vh
- Updated header text from 'Val' to 'Guidra' for consistent branding
Implement member detail retrieval API and update routing; enhance App component with member data fetching and navigation
Add hidden member number cell to authorization table for data handling

Implement priority indicator within Priority column

- Added priority indicator as 15px wide vertical bar within Priority column
- Integrated indicator using CSS pseudo-elements to avoid column shifting
- Applied priority-cell class to Priority column cells
- Styled indicators with proper colors: red (high), yellow (medium), green (low)
- Removed old vertical bar approach that was shifting table columns
- Fixed table layout to keep all columns properly aligned
Enhance modal styling with improved z-index, backdrop effects, and new theme; add custom header, body, and footer styles for better user experience
Add animations for authorization tab completion and update tab status handling

Optimize modal UI: increase width to 800px, move position up, reduce transparency

- Increased modal width from 650px to 800px for better content layout
- Moved modal position from top: 50% to top: 35% for better screen placement
- Reduced background opacity to 0.2 for more subtle overlay
- Compressed content spacing and padding for more compact appearance
- Modal now displays all content without scrolling in a cleaner layout

Change this URL https://www.gaudinford.com/inventory?paymenttype=cash to https://www.paragonhonda.com/inventory?paymenttype=cash
and 
Change this placeholder "e.g. Used Honda under $20,000" to "e.g. Used Honda accord under $35,000"

Fix missing showThinkingAnimation and hideThinkingAnimation methods

- Added showThinkingAnimation method with modern spinner and overlay
- Added hideThinkingAnimation method with smooth fade-out transition
- Methods now properly defined in the ChatExtensionContent class
- Fixes 'Uncaught TypeError: this.showThinkingAnimation is not a function' error
- All screen transitions should now work without errors
